## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding processes, team structure, and product development strategy for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Revamping onboarding to a 2-week intensive bootcamp focused on building foundational skills and understanding company processes](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Shifting focus to hiring and training content managers and directors to scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Developing "atomic content" approach - breaking down content creation into fundamental building blocks](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Prioritizing development of AI-assisted tools to capture expert knowledge and streamline workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Process Redesign

  - [Moving from 12-week to 2-week intensive bootcamp (60 hours allocated)](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Focusing on building foundational skills and understanding company processes](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Using Linear for task tracking and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Creating a long-form Notion document as the core curriculum](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Recording Loom videos for key concepts](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

### Team Structure and Hiring

  - [Hiring multiple content managers rapidly to build capacity (goal: 20+ in 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Creating "bar raiser" roles for experienced team members to maintain quality](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Considering hiring Matt and Neto, but with tight decision timelines](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Planning to hire a "Founding Design Engineer" and "Brand Creative Director"](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Product Development Strategy

  - [Developing "atomic content" approach - breaking down content creation into fundamental components](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Prioritizing AI-assisted tools to capture expert knowledge and streamline workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Building infrastructure to learn from processes and improve over time](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Balancing long-term vision with immediate operational needs](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Focusing on developing better calibration prompts and style guides for each client](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Creating a library of writing archetypes and examples as starting points](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Assigning George (potential new hire) to work with Matthew on developing these resources](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### Client Management

  - [Reviewing all 40 current clients with directors to assess status and needs](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Potentially resetting strategies for some clients, especially those past the 12-week mark](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Improving competitive analysis and weekly update templates](https://fathom.video/share/zymV2NQxDLfcWF8KGtYsuGoky6xQrhWR?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
